title: Create: Rethinked
description: A modpack that covers a wide range of genres, from exploration and combat to engineering - Quests included!
body:
# Create: Rethinked

**Create: Rethinked** is a modpack that offers you a huge range of options. 
From exploration to compat or huge factories, there is everything.
_Your imagination is the limit._

And if you don't know what to do: There are **Quests**!

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1237130154845802497/1240575742262247456/2024-05-05_16.29.10.png?ex=66470fb1&is=6645be31&hm=f0af8d68201d252fbba5862b328454b96b096463680287eb64baa546a2a0086b&)

# Installation
<details>
<summary>Click to view guide</summary>

# Client

1️⃣ [Install Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app)

2️⃣ Install Modpack

3️⃣ Click on Modpack (You can skip this step if you have set a global memory setting)
  - Go to _Options_
  - Scroll down to _Java memory_
  - Enable _Override global memory settings_
  - Set value to at least _6144MB / 6GB_

4️⃣ Click Play and enjoy!

# Server
__Soon...__

</details>


# Recommended Extra Mods
<details>
<summary>Click to view list</summary>

- [Better Villages](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-village-forge)
- [GPUMemLeakFix](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fix-gpu-memory-leak/files/4884976)
- [Farsight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farsight/files/4870168)

</details>


## Mod Spotlight
<details>
<summary>Click to view list</summary>

- **Thirst was Taken & Farmer's Delight** -> Food and Thirst
 
- **Applied Energistic 2 & Tom's Simple Storage Mod** -> Storage

- **Create** -> Transportation and Machinery

- **Immersive Aircraft, Automobility & Small Ships** -> Travelling

- **Supplementaries & Beautify** -> Decoration

- **Blue Skies & Aether** -> Adventure

- **Chance Cubes & Simple Hats** -> Fun

Note that this is a **small** selection of mods. There are a lot more mods to discover!
Full list can be found in the next section.

</details>
